MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Malachowski, Esq. (415-983-0717), for Conrado Amador, Defendant.
No other appearance.

No arguments heard. Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JOHN CULVER's Motion For Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. No opposition received.
